title: NOEMA$^\rm{3D}$: A deep view of cold gas flows in a barred spiral galaxy at $z\sim1$
summary: We present a deep, high-resolution CO(4-3) IRAM-NOEMA observation of a main sequence, barred, spiral galaxy at $z\approx1.12$, with an on-source integration time of $\approx37$ hours and a beam FWHM of $\approx0.\!\!^{\prime\prime}3$. We use the molecular gas data in conjunction with the available deep multi-band JWST and HST imaging, covering restframe UV to near-IR wavelengths, to quantitatively study the gas flows in the disk plane of this cosmic noon barred spiral. We find that this target is a massive ($\log(M_{\rm{baryons}}/M_\odot)\approx10.96$), baryon-dominated ($f_{\rm{dm}}(<R_e)=u^2_{\rm{circ,dm}}(R_e)/u^2_{\rm{circ}}(R_e)\sim4\%$), gas-rich ($f_{\rm{gas}}=M_{\rm{gas}}/(M_{\rm{\star}}+M_{\rm{gas}})\approx40\%$) disk, hosting a long ($a_{\rm{bar}}\approx4.2$ kpc), strong ($Q_{\rm{b}}\approx0.37$), and fast ($\mathcal{R}=R_{\rm{CR}}/a_{\rm{bar}}\approx1.05$) bar, which rotates at an angular speed of $Ω_{\rm{pattern}}\approx$ 50 km/s/kpc. This bar is driving molecular gas inflows with a net inflow rate of $\dot{M}\sim30$ $M_\odot$/yr, based on three estimates, which is of the same order as the galaxy-integrated star formation rate ($\rm{SFR}\approx36$ $M_\odot$/yr). We additionally identify evidence of a well-defined dust lane shock at the northwestern side of the bar, with gas motions parallel to this feature, in agreement with expectations for an established bar-driven flow. Our study highlights the possible role of bars as key drivers of galaxy evolution for a significant fraction of cosmic noon galaxies, offering a detailed picture of well-defined, bar-driven inflows in a high-$z$ barred spiral.

AI.tldr: 本文利用高分辨率NOEMA观测和JWST/HST多波段数据，研究了红移1.12处一个主序棒旋星系的分子气体流入，发现其强棒驱动了约30 M☉/yr的净气体流入率，与星系整体恒星形成率相当，表明棒在宇宙正午时期对星系演化起关键作用。
AI.motivation: 目前对高红移（宇宙正午时期）棒旋星系中气体流入的定量观测研究仍十分有限，缺乏高分辨率的分子气体数据来直接测量棒驱动的气体流入率及其对星系演化的影响。
AI.method: 使用IRAM-NOEMA进行约37小时的CO(4-3)高分辨率观测（波束FWHM约0.3角秒），结合JWST和HST的多波段成像数据，定量分析星系盘面内的气体流动，通过多种方法估算净流入率。
AI.result: 该星系是一个重子主导（暗物质比例仅4%）、气体丰富（气体分数约40%）的盘状星系，拥有长（4.2 kpc）、强（Qb≈0.37）、快（角速度50 km/s/kpc）的棒结构，驱动约30 M☉/yr的分子气体净流入率，与恒星形成率（36 M☉/yr）相当，并在棒西北侧观测到尘埃及激波特征。
AI.conclusion: 棒结构可能是宇宙正午时期大量星系演化的关键驱动力之一，为高红移棒旋星系中清晰定义的棒驱动气体流入提供了详细的观测证据。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 我们展示了对一个位于$z\approx1.12$的主序棒旋星系的深度、高分辨率CO(4-3) IRAM-NOEMA观测，其源上积分时间约为37小时，波束半高全宽约为$0.\!\!^{\prime\prime}3$。我们结合分子气体数据与可用的深度多波段JWST和HST成像（覆盖静止框架紫外到近红外波长），定量研究了该宇宙正午棒旋星系盘面内的气体流动。我们发现该目标是一个大质量（$\log(M_{\rm{baryons}}/M_\odot)\approx10.96$）、重子主导（$f_{\rm{dm}}(<R_e)=u^2_{\rm{circ,dm}}(R_e)/u^2_{\rm{circ}}(R_e)\sim4\%$）、富含气体（$f_{\rm{gas}}=M_{\rm{gas}}/(M_{\rm{\star}}+M_{\rm{gas}})\approx40\%$）的盘，拥有一个长（$a_{\rm{bar}}\approx4.2$ kpc）、强（$Q_{\rm{b}}\approx0.37$）、快（$\mathcal{R}=R_{\rm{CR}}/a_{\rm{bar}}\approx1.05$）的棒，其角速度为$Ω_{\rm{pattern}}\approx$ 50 km/s/kpc。该棒驱动分子气体流入，基于三种估计的净流入率为$\dot{M}\sim30$ $M_\odot$/yr，与星系整体恒星形成率（$\rm{SFR}\approx36$ $M_\odot$/yr）处于同一量级。我们还识别出在棒的西北侧存在明确的尘埃带激波证据，气体运动平行于该特征，这与已建立的棒驱动流预期一致。我们的研究强调了棒作为宇宙正午时期大量星系演化关键驱动因素的可能作用，为高红移棒旋星系中清晰定义的棒驱动流入提供了详细图像。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，棒结构可能是宇宙正午时期大量星系演化的关键驱动力之一，为高红移棒旋星系中清晰定义的棒驱动气体流入提供了详细的观测证据。

title: A Cosmic Archipelago of lensed metal-poor galaxies at $z\sim6$
comment: 15 pages (22 including Appendices), 7 figures. Accepted for publication in A&A
summary: The Cosmic Archipelago is an ensemble of galaxies, strongly lensed by the cluster MACSJ0416, showing extreme physical properties at $z\sim6.14$. We combine JWST/NIRCam with deep VLT/X-Shooter and JWST/NIRSpec IFU to perform a joint spectrophotometric analysis from the far ultraviolet to red optical rest-frame. We focus on CA4, a UV-faint ($M_{UV}=-17.7$), compact ($r_e=81\pm11$ pc) galaxy at $z=6.1446$, magnified by a factor $μ=3.73$. CA4 is a young, low-mass ($M_\star =4.3\times10^6$ M$\odot$), star-forming (${\rm SFR}=0.46$ M$\odot$/yr), and metal-poor ($Z\sim0.02$ Z$\odot$) galaxy, and an efficient producer of ionizing photons ($\log(ξ_{ion}/{\rm erg^{-1} Hz})\sim25.5$). Its properties place CA4 at the poorly explored interface between massive stellar clusters and dwarf galaxies during the epoch of reionization. Moreover, CA4 shows large Ly$α$ ($f_{esc}^{\rm Lyα}\sim43\%$) and Lyman-continuum ($f_{esc}\sim47\%$) escape fractions, consistent with its small Ly$α$ velocity offset ($Δv\sim100$ km/s) and extremely blue UV-continuum slope ($β=-3.10$). These characteristics suggest that such UV-faint, metal-poor galaxies may contribute significantly to cosmic reionization. We also confirm five additional systems at the redshift of the Cosmic Archipelago, magnified by factors up to 12.5. They are all young (mass-weighted ages $<11$ Myr) and metal-poor ($Z<0.05$ Z$_\odot$), spanning a wide range of stellar masses and SFRs. Given the large number of these bursty star-forming galaxies in a small cosmic volume, we estimate that the currently known members of the Cosmic Archipelago result in a significant overdensity at $z\sim6$ ($Δz\sim0.08$), with $δ_{gal}=12.3^{+6.6}_{-4.6}$. These results highlight the Cosmic Archipelago as an unprecedented laboratory for studying the earliest groups of low-mass, low-metallicity galaxies during the epoch of reionization.

AI.tldr: 本文利用JWST和VLT/X-Shooter数据，对一个被星系团MACSJ0416强透镜的“宇宙群岛”系统进行光谱分析，发现其中CA4等UV暗弱、低质量、贫金属的星系具有极高的电离光子逃逸比例，可能对宇宙再电离有重要贡献。

AI.method: 联合JWST/NIRCam、VLT/X-Shooter和JWST/NIRSpec IFU数据，对宇宙群岛系统进行从远紫外到红光学静止参考系的光谱-测光联合分析，测量星系物理性质（质量、恒星形成率、金属丰度、电离光子效率、Lyα和莱曼连续谱逃逸分数等）。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 宇宙群岛是一个由星系构成的集合，这些星系被星系团MACSJ0416强烈透镜，在红移$z\sim6.14$处展现出极端的物理性质。我们结合JWST/NIRCam与深度的VLT/X-Shooter和JWST/NIRSpec IFU，从远紫外到红光学静止参考系进行联合分光光度分析。我们重点关注CA4，这是一个紫外暗弱（$M_{UV}=-17.7$）、致密（$r_e=81\pm11$ pc）、位于$z=6.1446$的星系，被放大因子$μ=3.73$所放大。CA4是一个年轻、低质量（$M_\star =4.3\times10^6$ M$\odot$）、正在形成恒星（${\rm SFR}=0.46$ M$\odot$/yr）且金属贫乏（$Z\sim0.02$ Z$\odot$）的星系，并且是电离光子的高效生产者（$\log(ξ_{ion}/{\rm erg^{-1} Hz})\sim25.5$）。这些特性将CA4置于再电离时期大质量星团与矮星系之间鲜有探索的界面。此外，CA4显示出大的Ly$α$逃逸比例（$f_{esc}^{\rm Lyα}\sim43\%$）和莱曼连续谱逃逸比例（$f_{esc}\sim47\%$），与其小的Ly$α$速度偏移（$Δv\sim100$ km/s）和极蓝的紫外连续谱斜率（$β=-3.10$）一致。这些特征表明，此类紫外暗弱、金属贫乏的星系可能对宇宙再电离有重要贡献。我们还确认了宇宙群岛红移处的另外五个系统，它们被放大因子高达12.5。它们都很年轻（质量加权年龄$<11$ Myr）且金属贫乏（$Z<0.05$ Z$_\odot$），跨越了广泛的恒星质量和恒星形成率范围。鉴于在一个小的宇宙体积内存在大量这类爆发式恒星形成星系，我们估计目前已知的宇宙群岛成员在$z\sim6$（$Δz\sim0.08$）处导致了一个显著的超密度，其$δ_{gal}=12.3^{+6.6}_{-4.6}$。这些结果凸显了宇宙群岛作为一个前所未有的实验室，用于研究再电离时期最早的低质量、低金属星系群。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要的总结：紫外暗弱、金属贫乏的星系可能是宇宙再电离的重要贡献者，宇宙群岛系统为研究再电离时期最早的低质量、低金属星系群提供了前所未有的实验平台。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: Combined HST and JWST color image (2023-146 release), showing an overview of the Cosmic Archipelago. We plot in yellow the Ly \(\alpha\) contours from MUSE, at \(z\sim 6.14\) , and in green the four NIRSpec-IFU pointings of the GO program 1908 (PI: E. Vanzella). The CA1 and CA2 pointings have been analyzed by Messa et al. ( 2025 ) and Vanzella et al. ( 2024 ) , respectively. The cyan square, representing the fifth pointing of the same GO program, covers the extremely metal-poor system LAP1 at \(z=6.63\) , presented in Vanzella et al. ( 2023a ) . In this work, we focus on the pointing targeting CA4, visible on the upper right corner.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：结合HST和JWST的彩色图像（2023-146发布），展示了宇宙群岛的概览。我们用黄色绘制了来自MUSE的Ly \(\alpha\) 等值线，位于\(z\sim 6.14\)，并用绿色绘制了GO项目1908（PI: E. Vanzella）的四个NIRSpec-IFU指向。CA1和CA2指向已分别由Messa等人（2025）和Vanzella等人（2024）分析。青色方块代表同一GO项目的第五个指向，覆盖了位于\(z=6.63\)的极端金属贫乏系统LAP1，由Vanzella等人（2023a）介绍。在这项工作中，我们重点关注指向CA4的指向，可见于右上角。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: Summary of the JWST photometric and spectroscopic data of CA4. Top left : cutout around CA4 of an image obtained by stacking the NIRCam SW filters (i.e., F090W, F115W, F150W, F200W) with the 0.02″/pix reduction. Top center : CA4 in the stacked NIRCam LW filters (i.e., F277W, F356W, F410M, F444W) with the 0.04″/pix reduction. The blue circle, with a radius of 0.2″, represents the adopted aperture to derive photometric quantities (see Sect. 3.2 ). Top right : CA4 in an image created by collapsing the NIRSpec IFU cube at the wavelengths of the \(H\alpha\) , \(H\beta\) , and [O III ] \(\lambda\lambda 4959,5007\) lines. The thick dark blue contour marks the aperture adopted as reference for extracting the 1D spectra shown below, and refers to an aperture of approximately 0.3″centered on CA4. The green aperture shows instead the \(r=0.2\arcsec\) aperture. Bottom panels: reference 1D spectra of CA4 and 1 \(\sigma\) uncertainties (shaded region). We show cutouts around the four detected lines, \(H\beta\) (left), [O III ] \(\lambda\lambda 4959,5007\) (center) and \(H\alpha\) (right). No stellar or nebular continuum is detected.
figures.caption_zh: 图2：CA4的JWST测光和光谱数据总结。左上：通过叠加NIRCam SW滤光片（即F090W、F115W、F150W、F200W）并以0.02″/像素分辨率获得的图像中CA4的切图。上中：CA4在叠加的NIRCam LW滤光片（即F277W、F356W、F410M、F444W）中以0.04″/像素分辨率获得的图像。蓝色圆圈半径为0.2″，代表用于推导测光量的孔径（见第3.2节）。右上：通过将NIRSpec IFU数据立方体在\(H\alpha\)、\(H\beta\)和[O III ] \(\lambda\lambda 4959,5007\)谱线波长处压缩创建的图像中CA4的切图。深蓝色粗轮廓标记了作为提取下方所示一维光谱参考的孔径，对应于以CA4为中心约0.3″的孔径。绿色孔径则代表\(r=0.2\arcsec\)的孔径。底部面板：CA4的参考一维光谱及1 \(\sigma\) 不确定度（阴影区域）。我们展示了四条检测到的谱线周围的切图：\(H\beta\)（左）、[O III ] \(\lambda\lambda 4959,5007\)（中）和\(H\alpha\)（右）。未检测到恒星或星云连续谱。

figures.caption_en: Table 1: Physical properties of CA4 derived from photometry and SED fitting. 3 3 3 All the reported values are intrinsic, and thus corrected for the total magnification factor \(\mu_{tot}\) (the magnification at the CA4 position is fairly isotropic, \(\mu_{tang}\sim\mu_{rad}\) ).
figures.caption_zh: 表1：从测光和SED拟合推导出的CA4物理性质。3 3 3 所有报告的值均为内禀值，因此已针对总放大因子\(\mu_{tot}\)进行了校正（CA4位置的放大率相当各向同性，\(\mu_{tang}\sim\mu_{rad}\)）。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: Photometry and joint broadband+spectroscopy SED fitting results for CA4. Left panel : black points show the CA4 magnitudes obtained through aperture photometry (see Sect. 3.2 and Appendix A ), superimposed to the three solutions obtained with SED fitting, shown in red and blue ( \(f_{{esc}}=0\) ), and green (free \(f_{{esc}}\) ). While they robustly predict similar ages, \(M_{\star}\) , \(\log U\) , and SFR, they have different metallicities. For each of the solutions, we show the best-fit spectrum (solid line), the 1 \(\sigma\) uncertainties (shaded regions), and the resulting best-fit photometry (empty squares). The grey regions close to the \(x\) -axis show the regions where the NIRSpec spectrum was fitted, shown on the right panels. Right panels : CA4 NIRSpec spectrum (dark blue) superimposed to the best-fit spectrum and uncertainties for the three SED models. In the bottom right panel, we show the resulting non-parametric SFHs for the three models.
figures.caption_zh: 图3：CA4的测光和联合宽带+光谱SED拟合结果。左面板：黑点显示通过孔径测光获得的CA4星等（见第3.2节和附录A），叠加了通过SED拟合获得的三个解，分别以红色、蓝色（\(f_{{esc}}=0\)）和绿色（自由\(f_{{esc}}\)）显示。虽然它们稳健地预测了相似的年龄、\(M_{\star}\)、\(\log U\)和SFR，但它们的金属丰度不同。对于每个解，我们展示了最佳拟合光谱（实线）、1 \(\sigma\) 不确定度（阴影区域）以及由此产生的最佳拟合测光（空心方块）。靠近\(x\)轴的灰色区域显示了拟合NIRSpec光谱的区域，如右面板所示。右面板：CA4的NIRSpec光谱（深蓝色）叠加了三个SED模型的最佳拟合光谱和不确定度。在右下方面板中，我们展示了三个模型产生的非参数SFH。

( 2024 ) calibration. \(\#\) : the continuum below the Ly \(\alpha\) was estimated extrapolating \(M_{UV}\) at the relative wavelength according to the \(\beta\) slope and correcting for the extinction (all quantities are reported in Tab. 1 ). \(\star\) : the FWHM was corrected for instrumental broadening. \({\ddagger}\) : the red-blue asymmetry is reported here, with \(A_{{RB}}=(F_{{red}}-F_{{blue}})/F_{{Ly\alpha}}\) , where \(F_{{red}}\) and \(F_{{blue}}\) are the Ly \(\alpha\) fluxes measured red-ward and blue-ward from the line peak, respectively.

title: A Steep-Extinction QSO at z=4.6: JWST Evidence for Abundant Small Dust Grains
comment: 14 pages, 6 figures; submitted to ApJ Letters; comments welcome
summary: The rapid accumulation of massive dust reservoirs in the early Universe remains a major challenge in astrophysics. While core-collapse supernovae can inject large dust grains ($a \gtrsim 0.1\,μ{\rm m}$) on short timescales, explaining the total dust budgets in the early Universe likely requires efficient grain growth in the interstellar medium (ISM). Such growth depends critically on an abundant population of small grains, which maximize the surface area available for accretion and may be generated by rapid dust-processing or dust-formation channels. Here, we report the discovery of a QSO UDS-27023 at $z=4.556\pm0.003$, identified using JWST/NIRSpec spectroscopy. By quantitatively comparing the spectra to QSO composite templates, we find that UDS-27023 displays an exceptionally steep far-UV extinction curve ($A_{1500}/A_V \approx 8$) but notably lacks the 2175 Angstrom bump, indicating a dominance of small silicate dust grains. We interpret this phenomenology as evidence for active small-grain production and processing in the QSO environment. Mechanical shattering of pre-existing large grains by QSO-driven shocks and outflows provides one natural pathway, while in-situ condensation of silicate grains inside dense QSO-driven winds may offer an additional route. Such a population of steep-extinction QSOs (SEQs) may therefore reveal a short-lived phase in which luminous AGN generate, process, and redistribute small grains, potentially facilitating rapid ISM grain growth and enriching the circumgalactic medium.

AI.tldr: 利用JWST/NIRSPEC光谱发现了一个红移z=4.556的类星体UDS-27023，该天体表现出极陡的远紫外消光曲线（A1500/AV≈8）但缺乏2175埃吸收特征，表明其星际介质中弥漫着小尺寸硅酸盐尘埃颗粒，这为早期宇宙中快速尘埃积累机制提供了新见解。
AI.motivation: 早期宇宙中巨大的尘埃储库如何在短时间内快速积累是当前天体物理学的重要难题。尽管核坍缩超新星能快速注入大尘埃颗粒，但要解释早期宇宙的总尘埃预算，还需要星际介质中的有效晶粒生长，而这种生长依赖于大量小尺寸尘埃颗粒的存在。
AI.method: 使用JWST/NIRSpec光谱观测并识别出类星体UDS-27023（红移z=4.556±0.003），将其光谱与类星体复合模板进行定量比较，分析其远紫外消光曲线和2175埃特征。
AI.result: UDS-27023展现出极陡的远紫外消光曲线（A1500/AV≈8），但缺乏2175埃吸收特征，表明星际介质中以小尺寸硅酸盐尘埃颗粒为主导。
AI.conclusion: 这一现象表明类星体环境中存在活跃的小颗粒产生和加工过程。类星体驱动的激波和外流对预先存在的大颗粒进行机械破碎是一种自然途径，而类星体驱动的致密风中原位凝结硅酸盐颗粒则提供了额外可能。这类陡消光类星体可能揭示了活跃星系核生成、加工和再分布小颗粒的短寿命阶段，有助于促进星际介质中快速的晶粒生长并丰富星系周介质。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 早期宇宙中大量尘埃储库的快速积累仍然是天体物理学中的一个重大挑战。虽然核心坍缩超新星可以在短时间内注入大尘埃颗粒（$a \gtrsim 0.1\,μ{\rm m}$），但要解释早期宇宙中的总尘埃预算，很可能需要星际介质（ISM）中高效的颗粒生长。这种生长关键依赖于丰富的小颗粒群，它们能最大化可用于吸积的表面积，并可能通过快速的尘埃处理或尘埃形成通道产生。在此，我们报告发现了一个红移为$z=4.556\pm0.003$的类星体UDS-27023，该发现基于JWST/NIRSpec光谱。通过将光谱与类星体复合模板进行定量比较，我们发现UDS-27023显示出异常陡峭的远紫外消光曲线（$A_{1500}/A_V \approx 8$），但明显缺乏2175埃的隆起，这表明其尘埃以硅酸盐小颗粒为主。我们将这一现象解释为类星体环境中活跃的小颗粒产生和加工过程的证据。类星体驱动的激波和外流对预先存在的大颗粒进行机械破碎是一种自然途径，而在类星体驱动的致密风中原位凝结硅酸盐颗粒则提供了额外可能。这类陡消光类星体（SEQs）可能揭示了活跃星系核生成、加工和再分布小颗粒的一个短寿命阶段，从而可能促进星际介质中快速的颗粒生长并丰富星系周介质。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，结论如下：这一现象表明类星体环境中存在活跃的小颗粒产生和加工过程。类星体驱动的激波和外流对预先存在的大颗粒进行机械破碎是一种自然途径，而类星体驱动的致密风中原位凝结硅酸盐颗粒则提供了额外可能。这类陡消光类星体可能揭示了活跃星系核生成、加工和再分布小颗粒的短寿命阶段，有助于促进星际介质中快速的晶粒生长并丰富星系周介质。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: JWST imaging and spectroscopy of UDS-27023 (catalog ) . Top: \(2\arcsec\times 2\arcsec\) JWST/NIRCam cutouts in the available filters and an RGB composite (left), showing that the source is compact and dominated by a point source in all bands. Bottom: JWST/NIRSpec PRISM spectrum (black) overlaid with the NIRCam photometry (blue hexagons), illustrating the bright continuum and strong broad emission lines characteristic of a Type I QSO. The spectrum shows a strongly suppressed rest-frame UV continuum relative to the rest-frame optical emission, suggesting an exceptionally steep extinction curve. Inset: Zoom-in on the G395H/F290LP spectrum around H \(\alpha\) , together with a multi-component fit (solid red; dashed components). The spectroscopic redshift of UDS-27023 (catalog ) is measured to be \(z=4.556\pm 0.003\) .
figures.caption_zh: 图1：UDS-27023（目录）的JWST成像和光谱。顶部：在可用滤光片下的\(2\arcsec\times 2\arcsec\) JWST/NIRCam剪裁图像和一张RGB合成图（左），显示该源结构紧凑，在所有波段均以点源为主。底部：JWST/NIRSpec PRISM光谱（黑色）叠加了NIRCam测光数据（蓝色六边形），展示了I型类星体特征的明亮连续谱和强宽发射线。相对于静止系光学辐射，该光谱显示出强烈抑制的静止系紫外连续谱，暗示存在异常陡峭的消光曲线。插图：G395H/F290LP光谱在H \(\alpha\) 附近的放大图，以及一个多分量拟合（红色实线；虚线分量）。UDS-27023（目录）的光谱红移测量值为\(z=4.556\pm 0.003\)。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: Rest-frame SED and inferred line-of-sight extinction curve of UDS-27023 (catalog ) . Left: Rest-frame UV–optical–NIR spectrum of UDS-27023 (catalog ) (red) compared to an intrinsic blue-QSO composite (blue). The orange curve shows the spectrum corrected using the best-fit extinction curve, illustrating that the dereddened continuum approaches the intrinsic QSO template over the wavelength range. Right: Extinction curve reconstructed for UDS-27023 (catalog ) shown as \(A_{\lambda}/A_{{V}}\) versus wavenumber ( \(1/\lambda\) ; thick red curve), with the shaded red band indicating the corresponding best-fit parametric extinction model with uncertainty. For comparison, we plot the Milky Way and SMC extinction curves, the Calzetti et al. ( 2000 ) starburst attenuation law, the average QSO extinction curve (Temple et al. , 2021 ) , and the set of attenuation curves measured for JWST galaxies at \(z>4\) by Markov et al. 2025 (thin grey curves). Vertical shaded bands mark the \(V\) band and rest-frame 3000 Å and 1500 Å ; the location of the 2175 Å bump is indicated for reference. The SEQ extinction curve rises substantially more steeply into the UV than any of these commonly used laws.
figures.caption_zh: 图2：UDS-27023（目录）的静止系SED和推断的视线方向消光曲线。左图：UDS-27023（目录）的静止系紫外-光学-近红外光谱（红色）与一个本征蓝色类星体复合模板（蓝色）的比较。橙色曲线显示了使用最佳拟合消光曲线校正后的光谱，说明消光校正后的连续谱在波长范围内接近本征类星体模板。右图：为UDS-27023（目录）重建的消光曲线，表示为\(A_{\lambda}/A_{{V}}\) 与波数（\(1/\lambda\)）的关系（粗红色曲线），红色阴影带表示相应的最佳拟合参数化消光模型及其不确定性。作为比较，我们绘制了银河系和小麦哲伦云的消光曲线、Calzetti等人（2000）的星暴衰减律、平均类星体消光曲线（Temple等人，2021），以及Markov等人（2025）为\(z>4\)的JWST星系测量的一组衰减曲线（细灰色曲线）。垂直阴影带标记了\(V\)波段以及静止系3000 Å和1500 Å；2175 Å隆起的位置也标出以供参考。SEQ消光曲线在紫外区域的上升幅度比这些常用定律中的任何一个都陡峭得多。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: Physical interpretation and context for the steep extinction toward UDS-27023 (catalog ) . Left: Location of SEQ (red symbol) in the plane of dust-law steepness, \(S\equiv A_{1500}/A_{{V}}\) , versus \(A_{{V}}\) . The grey-scale background shows the distribution of dust attenuation slopes inferred for SDSS galaxies from the GSWLC survey (Salim et al. , 2016 , 2018 ) , and the blue points show the \(z\approx 2\) –10 JWST galaxy attenuation constraints from Markov et al. ( 2025 ) . Horizontal dashed lines indicate the values expected for standard Milky Way and SMC extinction curves, illustrating that SEQ lies at significantly larger \(S\) than both typical low- and high-redshift galaxy extinction and attenuation laws at moderate \(A_{{V}}\) . Right: Comparison of the SEQ extinction curve (red band; normalized at V-band) to common empirical laws (MW and SMC) and to illustrative MRN grain-size models (Mathis et al. , 1977 ) computed from optical properties of silicate and graphite (Draine and Lee, 1984 ; Weingartner and Draine, 2001 ; Laor and Draine, 1993 ) . The grey curves show an MRN-like size distribution ( \(dn/da\propto a^{-3.5}\) ) with a standard silicate+graphite mixture (solid) and silicate-only dust (dashed). Colored curves demonstrate how varying the size-distribution slope \(q\) (defined by \(dn/da\propto a^{-q}\) ) changes the UV rise: small-grain–weighted distributions (larger \(q\) ) produce substantially steeper far-UV extinction than large-grain/gray cases (smaller \(q\) ). The green dotted line denotes a CGM dust extinction curve with a steep slope (Sun et al. , 2026 ) at \(z=3.5\) . Vertical bands mark rest-frame 3000 Å and 1500 Å and the \(V\) band. Together, these panels show that SEQ probes an extreme, line-of-sight extinction law, qualitatively consistent with a dust population strongly weighted toward small grains.
figures.caption_zh: 图3：对UDS-27023（目录）陡峭消光的物理解释和背景。左图：SEQ（红色符号）在尘埃律陡度\(S\equiv A_{1500}/A_{{V}}\) 与\(A_{{V}}\) 平面中的位置。灰色刻度背景显示了GSWLC巡天（Salim等人，2016，2018）推断的SDSS星系尘埃衰减斜率分布，蓝色点显示了Markov等人（2025）对\(z\approx 2\) –10 JWST星系的衰减约束。水平虚线表示标准银河系和小麦哲伦云消光曲线的预期值，说明在中等\(A_{{V}}\) 下，SEQ的\(S\) 值显著大于典型的低红移和高红移星系消光及衰减律。右图：SEQ消光曲线（红色带；在V波段归一化）与常见经验定律（银河系和小麦哲伦云）以及基于硅酸盐和石墨光学性质（Draine and Lee, 1984；Weingartner and Draine, 2001；Laor and Draine, 1993）计算的说明性MRN颗粒尺寸模型（Mathis等人，1977）的比较。灰色曲线显示了具有标准硅酸盐+石墨混合物（实线）和仅硅酸盐尘埃（虚线）的MRN-like尺寸分布（\(dn/da\propto a^{-3.5}\)）。彩色曲线展示了改变尺寸分布斜率\(q\)（定义为\(dn/da\propto a^{-q}\)）如何改变紫外上升：小颗粒加权分布（较大的\(q\)）产生的远紫外消光比大颗粒/灰色情况（较小的\(q\)）陡峭得多。绿色虚线表示红移\(z=3.5\)处具有陡峭斜率的CGM尘埃消光曲线（Sun等人，2026）。垂直带标记了静止系3000 Å和1500 Å以及\(V\)波段。这些图共同表明，SEQ探测到一种极端的视线方向消光律，在定性上与强烈偏向小颗粒的尘埃种群一致。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: Schematic illustration of the origin, distribution, and fate of small dust grains in the steep-extinction QSO. Left (Origin): In the early Universe, dust is predominantly injected as large grains by core-collapse supernovae (CCSNe), with minor contributions from AGB stars. Small grains may then be produced through two rapid channels in the QSO environment. In the first pathway, violent feedback drives grain–grain collisions, mechanically shattering large grains into small fragments. In the second pathway, silicate grains may condense in situ within dense QSO-driven winds. Middle (Distribution): The JWST line of sight probes through the circumnuclear region, the host galaxy’s interstellar medium (ISM), and the circumgalactic medium (CGM), directly detecting the steep extinction signature of an abundant small-grain population against the background QSO continuum. Right (Fate): These small grains face three primary evolutionary pathways: they may be destroyed via thermal sputtering in hot, shock-heated gas; they may remain locked in the ISM to facilitate subsequent molecular-cloud and star formation; or they may be entrained in cool-phase outflows and transported to the CGM, populating the extended, small-grain-rich halos recently observed around massive galaxies at high redshift.
figures.caption_zh: 图4：陡消光类星体中尘埃小颗粒的起源、分布和归宿的示意图。左图（起源）：在早期宇宙中，尘埃主要由核心坍缩超新星（CCSNe）以大颗粒形式注入，AGB恒星的贡献较小。小颗粒随后可能通过类星体环境中的两个快速通道产生。在第一条路径中，剧烈的反馈驱动颗粒-颗粒碰撞，将大颗粒机械破碎成小碎片。在第二条路径中，硅酸盐颗粒可能在致密的类星体驱动风中原位凝结。中图（分布）：JWST的视线穿过核周区域、宿主星系的星际介质（ISM）和星系周介质（CGM），直接探测到背景类星体连续谱上丰富小颗粒群的陡峭消光特征。右图（归宿）：这些小颗粒面临三种主要的演化路径：它们可能在热的、激波加热的气体中被热溅射摧毁；它们可能被锁定在ISM中，以促进随后的分子云和恒星形成；或者它们可能被卷入冷相外流并输送到CGM，从而填充最近在高红移大质量星系周围观测到的、富含小颗粒的延展晕。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5: Photometric selection biases induced by SEQ-like extinction. Left: A set of illustrative JWST/NIRCam color–color diagrams demonstrating that UDS-27023 (catalog ) (red symbol) lies outside common loci for AGN and QSOs in multiple color spaces. Colored tracks show synthetic colors for an intrinsic QSO composite (Selsing et al. , 2016 ) , representative LRD-like colors (Zhang et al. , 2025 ) , and the SEQ extinction model, evaluated as a function of redshift (color-coded). The grey background indicates the distribution of field sources from the JADES survey (Robertson et al. , 2026 ) in the same diagrams. Right: UVJ diagram adapted from Fig. 2 of Carnall et al. ( 2020 ) , illustrating possible misclassification of SEQ under an incorrect low-redshift interpretation. We overlay the inferred UVJ track of UDS-27023 (catalog ) when forced to \(z=2\) –3 (color-coded by assumed redshift) in galaxy-only SED fitting. It falls within the standard UVJ-quiescent selection region (within black solid lines), consistent with its previous identification as a candidate of \(z\approx 2.5\) quiescent galaxy.
figures.caption_zh: 图5：由SEQ-like消光引起的光度选择偏差。左图：一组说明性的JWST/NIRCam颜色-颜色图，显示UDS-27023（目录）（红色符号）在多个颜色空间中位于AGN和类星体的常见区域之外。彩色轨迹显示了本征类星体复合模板（Selsing等人，2016）、代表性的LRD-like颜色（Zhang等人，2025）以及SEQ消光模型的合成颜色，这些颜色是红移的函数（按颜色编码）。灰色背景显示了JADES巡天（Robertson等人，2026）中相同图上的场源分布。右图：改编自Carnall等人（2020）图2的UVJ图，说明了在错误的低红移解释下SEQ可能被错误分类。我们叠加了UDS-27023（目录）在强制假设红移\(z=2\) –3时（按假设红移颜色编码）在仅星系SED拟合中推断出的UVJ轨迹。它落在标准UVJ静止星系选择区域内（黑色实线内），与其先前被识别为\(z\approx 2.5\)静止星系候选体的情况一致。

figures.caption_en: Figure 6: Photometric redshift and SED modeling on the JWST photometry for UDS-27023 (catalog ) using the Prospector code, still revealing a quiescent/post-starburst galaxy at \(z_{{phot}}\approx 2.6\) . Left: Observed spectrum (thin red line) and photometry (filled red circles with error bars) compared with the best-fit Prospector model spectrum (thick black line) and synthetic photometry (open cyan squares). Fit residuals \(\chi\) are shown in the lower panel, with total \(\chi^{2}\) values for the fit indicated. Top right: Posterior star-formation rate (SFR) as a function of lookback time. Bottom right: Photometric redshift probability distribution \(P(z)\) . The spectroscopic redshift \(z_{{spec}}=4.556\) is marked by the vertical red dashed line.
figures.caption_zh: 图6：使用Prospector代码对UDS-27023（目录）的JWST测光数据进行的光度红移和SED建模，仍然揭示出一个红移\(z_{{phot}}\approx 2.6\)的静止/后星暴星系。左图：观测光谱（细红线）和测光数据（带误差棒的红色实心圆）与最佳拟合Prospector模型光谱（粗黑线）和合成测光数据（青色空心方块）的比较。拟合残差\(\chi\) 显示在下面板中，并标出了拟合的总\(\chi^{2}\) 值。右上图：恒星形成率（SFR）作为回溯时间的后验分布。右下图：光度红移概率分布\(P(z)\)。光谱红移\(z_{{spec}}=4.556\) 由红色垂直虚线标出。

title: Euclid: Disky titans -- surprisingly high star formation efficiency in two brightest group galaxies at $z\sim 0.75$
comment: Submitted to A&A, 14 pages, 7 figures, 2 tables
summary: We present the discovery of two disky titans in the first data release of the Euclid satellite. These sources are massive ($M>10^{11} M_\odot$) star-forming (SFR $\sim 20 M_\odot$/yr) discs located in strong over-densities at intermediate redshift ($z\sim 0.75$). They represent an small fraction of the massive galaxies in over-dense regions (just four candidates in more than 20 deg2 analysed in this study), and their existence is puzzling considering the abundance of passive and bulge-dominated sources commonly found at the centre of groups and clusters at low redshift. Firstly, our analysis shows that these objects are located in massive groups ($M_h\sim 10^{13.8} M_\odot$), where rapid accretion of cold gas should be prevented from the formation of a static hot halo. Despite this, a millimetre follow-up with NOEMA shows significant cold gas reservoirs $M_{h_2} \sim 10^{10.3} M_\odot$) within these sources. Secondly, our morphological analysis shows the presence of a massive and passive bulge in these galaxies, which is expected to stabilise the disc against fragmentation thereby suppressing further star formation. However, these sources lie on the Schmidt-Kennicutt relation or even slightly above. Building on these observations, we propose a scenario where these disky titans are the product of a merger-induced rejuvenation episode, in which the most massive galaxy of a group accretes cold gas from another member and briefly restarts star-formation. Such scenario is supported by a comparison with the TNG300 simulation and easily explains the surviving of star-formation activity in massive galaxies in over-dense environments as temporary stages in a more complex evolution. More in general, our study showcases the ability of Euclid to find rare objects thanks to the unprecedented statistics offered by its surveys and the scientific potential residing in the synergy between Euclid and other facilities observing at longer wavelengths.

AI.tldr: 利用欧几里得卫星首批数据发现两个位于红移~0.75高密度环境中的超大质量恒星形成盘状星系（质量>10^11太阳质量，恒星形成率~20太阳质量/年），它们仅占高密度区大质量星系的一小部分。NOEMA毫米波观测显示其拥有大量冷气体，形态分析表明存在大质量被动核球。研究提出合并诱导的再 rejuvenation 场景解释其存在，并与TNG300模拟结果一致。
AI.motivation: 高红移高密度环境中通常预期存在被动、核球主导的星系，但本研究发现两个盘状恒星形成星系，与现有理论预测相矛盾，挑战了传统认知。
AI.method: 利用欧几里得卫星首批数据进行统计分析，结合NOEMA毫米波干涉观测进行冷气体追踪，并开展形态分析，最后与TNG300宇宙学模拟进行比较验证。
AI.result: 发现两个盘状星系位于质量约10^13.8太阳质量的群中，拥有约10^10.3太阳质量的分子气体，且位于Schmidt-Kennicutt关系上或略高于该关系。
AI.conclusion: 提出合并诱导的再 rejuvenation 场景：群中最亮星系通过吸积伴星冷气体短暂重启恒星形成。这类星系代表了高密度环境中大质量星系演化的暂态阶段，展示了欧几里得卫星结合多波段观测发现稀有天体能力。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 我们报告了在欧几里得卫星首批数据发布中发现的两个盘状巨星系。这些源是位于中等红移（$z\sim 0.75$）强超密区域中的大质量（$M>10^{11} M_\odot$）恒星形成盘（恒星形成率 $\sim 20 M_\odot$/年）。它们代表了超密区域中大质量星系的一小部分（在本研究分析的超过20平方度中仅有四个候选体），并且考虑到在低红移的星系群和星系团中心通常存在被动且由核球主导的源，它们的存在令人费解。首先，我们的分析表明这些天体位于大质量星系群（$M_h\sim 10^{13.8} M_\odot$）中，在那里，静态热晕的形成应阻止冷气体的快速吸积。尽管如此，利用NOEMA进行的毫米波后续观测显示这些源内部存在显著的冷气体储库（$M_{h_2} \sim 10^{10.3} M_\odot$）。其次，我们的形态学分析显示这些星系中存在一个大质量且被动的核球，这预计会稳定盘面以防止碎裂，从而抑制进一步的恒星形成。然而，这些源位于Schmidt-Kennicutt关系上甚至略高于该关系。基于这些观测，我们提出了一种情景，即这些盘状巨星系是合并诱导的再 rejuvenation 事件的产物，在该事件中，星系群中最亮的星系从另一个成员星系吸积冷气体并短暂地重新启动恒星形成。通过与TNG300模拟的比较，这一情景得到了支持，并很容易将超密环境中大质量星系中恒星形成活动的存续解释为更复杂演化中的暂态阶段。更广泛地说，我们的研究展示了欧几里得卫星凭借其巡天提供的空前统计量以及欧几里得与其他更长波长观测设施之间的协同作用所具有的科学潜力，从而发现稀有天体的能力。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要，提出合并诱导的再 rejuvenation 场景：群中最亮星系通过吸积伴星冷气体短暂重启恒星形成。这类星系代表了高密度环境中大质量星系演化的暂态阶段，展示了欧几里得卫星结合多波段观测发现稀有天体能力。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: Colour-composite images of the two targets analysed in this paper and the surrounding environments. Each large image covers one square arcminute, with a side roughly corresponding to \(441\) proper \({kpc}\) at \(z\sim 0.7\) and it is obtained through the Lupton_01 algorithm by combining the \(I_{\scriptscriptstyleE}\) , \(Y_{\scriptscriptstyleE}\) , and \(H_{\scriptscriptstyleE}\) images. The white curves are the galaxy density field in units of \(\sigma\) above the median starting from \(3\sigma\) . The candidate members (i.e., with a redshift compatible with the over-density and with a density contrast higher than \(3\sigma\) ) are marked with red crosses. The inner panels report a zoom on the two disky titans, with sides of \(20\arcsec\times 20\arcsec\) . These images are generated with Jafar 2 2 2 https://jafar.astro.unistra.fr/ to highlight low surface brightness features by combining the four Euclid bands.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：本文分析的两个目标及其周围环境的彩色合成图像。每张大图覆盖一角分见方，边长在$z\sim 0.7$处大致对应\(441\) 本征\({kpc}\)，通过结合\(I_{\scriptscriptstyleE}\)、\(Y_{\scriptscriptstyleE}\)和\(H_{\scriptscriptstyleE}\)图像，使用Lupton_01算法获得。白色曲线是以中位数以上\(\sigma\)为单位的星系密度场，从\(3\sigma\)开始。候选成员（即红移与超密区域一致且密度对比高于\(3\sigma\)的星系）用红色十字标记。内部面板显示两个盘状巨星系的放大图，边长为\(20\arcsec\times 20\arcsec\)。这些图像通过结合四个欧几里得波段，使用Jafar 2 2 2 https://jafar.astro.unistra.fr/ 生成，以突出低表面亮度特征。

figures.caption_en: Table 1: Main properties estimated for the two disky titans presented in this paper. 5 5 5 The spectroscopic redshift of the galaxies is derived from the CO(2-1) transition observed with NOEMA, as well as the information about the gas content (Sect. 3.1 ). The constraints on the dust content come from the continuum emission, while the other physical properties are measured through SED fitting with CIGALE (Sect. 3.3 ).
figures.caption_zh: 表1：本文介绍的两个盘状巨星系的主要性质估计。5 5 5 星系的光谱红移来自NOEMA观测的CO(2-1)跃迁，以及气体含量的信息（第3.1节）。尘埃含量的约束来自连续谱发射，而其他物理性质通过使用CIGALE进行SED拟合测量（第3.3节）。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: Two CO(2-1) lines observed with NOEMA in the two targets presented in this paper. For each galaxy, the right panel reports their millimetre spectrum, with the channels belonging to the line (i.e., maximising its S/N; see Sect. 2.3 ) coloured in blue. The left panels show the moment-0 of the line superimposed to the color-composite image of the target. Contours increase by \(1\sigma\) , starting from \(2\sigma\) and \(5\sigma\) for the two galaxies, respectively. The synthesised beam is shown in the bottom left corner for reference.
figures.caption_zh: 图2：在本文介绍的两个目标中，用NOEMA观测到的两条CO(2-1)谱线。对于每个星系，右图报告了其毫米波谱，其中属于该谱线的通道（即最大化其信噪比；见第2.3节）用蓝色着色。左图显示了该谱线的零阶矩叠加在目标的彩色合成图像上。等值线以\(1\sigma\)递增，分别从\(2\sigma\)和\(5\sigma\)开始。左下角显示了合成波束以供参考。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: Two disky titans compared with the Schmidt–Kennicutt relation ( Schmidt_59 ; Kennicutt_98 ; left panel ), with the main sequence of star-forming galaxies (as parametrised by Euclid Collaboration: Enia et al. 2025 ; right panel ), and with the molecular gas fraction expected for MS galaxies at \(z\sim 0.75\) ( Tacconi_20 ; central panel ). In the left panel , we report the sequence of discs and star-bursting galaxies following Daddi_10a . In the right panel , we report the masses and SFR integrated over the whole galaxies, and of their bulges and disks separately (squares and diamonds, respectively) derived following the procedure described in Sect. 3.2 – 3.3 .
figures.caption_zh: 图3：两个盘状巨星系与Schmidt–Kennicutt关系（Schmidt_59；Kennicutt_98；左图）、恒星形成星系主序（由Euclid Collaboration: Enia et al. 2025参数化；右图）以及红移\(z\sim 0.75\)处主序星系预期的分子气体分数（Tacconi_20；中图）的比较。在左图中，我们报告了遵循Daddi_10a的盘状和星暴星系的序列。在右图中，我们报告了整个星系的质量和恒星形成率，以及分别按照第3.2–3.3节所述程序推导的其核球和盘的质量和恒星形成率（分别用正方形和菱形表示）。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: Morphological analysis of the two disky titans. For each galaxy, we report the data (in the \(I_{\scriptscriptstyleE}\) and \(H_{\scriptscriptstyleE}\) bands), the modelling with a double Srsic profile (see Sect. 3.2 ), and the residuals. Each stamp has a size of \(5\arcsec\times 5\arcsec\) .
figures.caption_zh: 图4：两个盘状巨星系的形态学分析。对于每个星系，我们报告了数据（在\(I_{\scriptscriptstyleE}\)和\(H_{\scriptscriptstyleE}\)波段）、使用双Srsic轮廓的建模（见第3.2节）以及残差。每个图幅大小为\(5\arcsec\times 5\arcsec\)。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5: SED fitting performed with CIGALE on the two disky titans. The photometry from Euclid is reported as red squares, while the additional photometry from ground-based observatories and IRAC is shown as orange points. The two coloured SEDs report the best-fitting SEDs for the bulge and disc components, whose photometry is derived as discussed in Sect. 3.2 . For all SED fittings, the redshift is fixed to the spectroscopic value found in Sect. 3.1 .
figures.caption_zh: 图5：使用CIGALE对两个盘状巨星系进行的SED拟合。来自欧几里得的光度测量用红色方块表示，而来自地面天文台和IRAC的附加光度测量用橙色点表示。两条彩色SED报告了核球和盘组件的最佳拟合SED，其光度测量按第3.2节所述推导。对于所有SED拟合，红移固定为第3.1节中发现的光谱值。

figures.caption_en: Table 2: Main properties estimated for the two groups analysed in this paper. 9 9 9 The second row reports the cumulative stellar mass of the objects detected in the DR1 images of the two groups, while the third row the total stellar mass obtained by statistically accounting for less massive galaxies. The radii of the two groups correspond to those where the local density is \(3\sigma\) above the median value at their redshift. The two halo masses are computed, respectively, starting from the stellar mass of the group and from the X-ray luminosity (see Sect. 4.2 ).
figures.caption_zh: 表2：本文分析的两个星系群的主要性质估计。9 9 9 第二行报告了在两个星系群的DR1图像中探测到的天体的累积恒星质量，而第三行报告了通过统计方法计入质量较小的星系后得到的总恒星质量。两个星系群的半径对应于其局部密度在红移处高于中位数\(3\sigma\)的位置。两个暗晕质量分别根据星系群的恒星质量和X射线光度计算（见第4.2节）。

figures.caption_en: Figure 6: Diffuse X-ray emission of the massive group hosting DT-2 as observed by XMM-Newton. The contours show the X-ray emission in the soft band ( \(0.5\mbox{--}2\,{keV}\) ) in units of \(\sigma\) above the median, starting from \(5\sigma\) and with steps of \(2\sigma\) . The X-ray spectrum is consistent with thermal Bremsstrahlung with \(T\sim 4\times 10^{6}\,{K}\) and a total \(L_{X}\sim 2\times 10^{43}\,{erg\,s^{-1}}\) .
figures.caption_zh: 图6：XMM-Newton观测到的宿主DT-2的大质量星系群的弥散X射线发射。等值线显示了软波段（\(0.5\mbox{--}2\,{keV}\)）中高于中位数、以\(\sigma\)为单位的X射线发射，从\(5\sigma\)开始，步长为\(2\sigma\)。X射线谱与温度为\(T\sim 4\times 10^{6}\,{K}\)、总\(L_{X}\sim 2\times 10^{43}\,{erg\,s^{-1}}\)的热轫致辐射一致。
